title: Experience Director

implementationSummary.thinkInvariant: Experience Director always last; throws if missing
implementationSummary.authority: veto power over complexity, settings dumps, widget sprawl

proofs: Experience Director exists (v1.2.0)
ED registered through AI Expert Framework
ED capability declares veto + personality actions
think() throws if ED did not review
experience_director alwaysInclude + priority 100 (runs last via registry)
think routes experts via registry while keeping ED gate
weather path reviewed by ED
workspace path reviewed by ED
customer-facing complete() text passes ED
chat/support/coach marked customer-facing
runtime max questions = 3 (Release Gate example)
Node evidence caps match Release Gate
Hubly personality: one business partner
evaluation rules: complexity/clarity/tone/UI/questions
Fixture A: Research 10 questions → ED reduces to 3 (veto complexity of questioning)
Fixture B: 25 website settings → ED converts to conversation (veto settings dump)
Fixture C: 18 dashboard widgets → ED shows 1, hides rest (veto)
Fixture D: enforces one Hubly personality (never robotic / multi-AI / technical)
Fixture E: evaluation rules score complexity / questions / UI / software-feel
Fixture F: celebrate milestone moments
Fixture G: reviewCustomerFacingText intercepts complete()-style replies
Fixture H: settingsToConversation helper
Execution logs: at least one ED interception modified a response
Execution logs: multiple ED reviews recorded this run
Section 2 documentation covers Release Gate

fixtures.claim: Experience Director intercepted and modified a settings dump into conversation

before.response: Here are all your website settings.

after.response: Here are all your website settings. I noticed there are a lot of site options (25). Instead of a settings wall, let's pick the one that matters most right now — starting with Setting 1, Setting 2, Setting 3, and the rest when you're ready. Nice work — this is a real milestone.
after.vetoReason: Overly complex customer-facing interaction — simplified to one Hubly conversation.
